commands.name: make lint-fast
commands.evidence: Verified repo operating pack, Go pins, validate workflow, CodeQL workflow presence, CodeQL Go binding, and go vet.

commands.name: make test-contracts
commands.evidence: Verified PRD-to-plan artifacts, T2.5/T2.6 evidence artifacts, required schema files, and Go tests.

commands.name: make prepush-full
commands.evidence: Ran fmt, lint-fast, test-fast, test-contracts, and build.

skipped_commands.name: GitHub Actions CodeQL analyze
skipped_commands.reason: CI-only scanner status is observed through PR lifecycle evidence; local validation verifies the workflow configuration and required CodeQL Go binding.

acceptance_results.check: docs/dev/dev_guides.md preserves all 12 test tiers with active, planned, reserved, or blocked status.
.github/workflows/codeql.yml exists and configures CodeQL Go analysis for pull_request and main pushes.
T3 and later product task packets carry ci_lane_refs, test_matrix_refs, coverage_policy_refs, security_scanner_gates, engineering_policy_refs, and architecture_guidance_refs.
docs/dev/dev_guides.md maps fast, core, acceptance, cross-platform, risk, and release CI lanes.
docs/dev/dev_guides.md defines docs parity, output contracts, release integrity, and provenance evidence rules.
docs/architecture/architecture_guides.md defines systems thinking, TDD/red-first, ADR, performance, reliability, trust-mode, and fail-closed rules.
T3 and later product task packets carry ci_lane_refs, test_matrix_refs, coverage_policy_refs, security_scanner_gates, engineering_policy_refs, and architecture_guidance_refs.

test_scope: Repo operating pack, CI lane mapping, CodeQL workflow, 12-level test matrix propagation, docs/output/release/provenance policy propagation, architecture policy propagation, and future task-packet enforcement fields.
independent_validation: validation-gate rerun required before PR promotion; CodeQL status observed by commit-push/PR lifecycle.
